description: Variance computed and assigned to a local variable that is never returned or used.
diff:
diff --git a/analytics.py b/analytics.py
--- a/analytics.py
+++ b/analytics.py
@@ -1,3 +1,4 @@
 def calculate_stats(values):
     mean = sum(values) / len(values)
+    variance = sum((x - mean) ** 2 for x in values) / len(values)
     return mean
